sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: geonames-sy.zip
rawFiles.notes: GeoNames Syria country dump cached under data-automation outputs.

transforms: Accepted held GeoNames RSTNQ feature rows as public abandoned railroad station references after review.
Used rail_terminal location type and rail transport mode for each accepted station.
Set operationalStatus to inactive because GeoNames RSTNQ denotes an abandoned railroad station.
Mapped GeoNames admin1 codes only to governorate-level OpenSyria identifiers; no exact locality link was inferred from nearest coordinates.
reviewNotes: Imported 5 held GeoNames abandoned railroad station rows as inactive historical rail terminal records. These records improve historical rail coverage but do not represent current rail service.
